overview.description: The TrueShares Structured Outcome (November) ETF (NOVZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses on the S&P 500 over a specific holdings period with uncapped gains, subject to strategy costs. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. NOVZ was launched on Oct 30, 2020 and is issued by Truemark Group.
